'''Booldrum Caslo''' was the cousin of [[Gerney Caslo]]. He was a [[List of phrases and slang/Legends#N|neep]] and the owner of one of the largest [[Library/Legends|libraries]] in [[Hweg Shul]] on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]].
